title: MCLN EX71 Configuration Guide
fullText:
center 83548 center 290830 EX 7 1 – Over-Receive Lots and Item Attributes Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 7 1 – Over-Receive Lots and Item Attributes Configuration Guide Table of Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1. Add EX71 System Code PAGEREF _Toc188004084 \h 3 2. Enable Transaction Parameter PAGEREF _Toc188004085 \h 4 3. Post Configuration Instructions   PAGEREF _Toc188004086 \h 6 4. Questions and Answers  PAGEREF _Toc188004087 \h 7 Add EX 71 System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX 71 Code ID : Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to Transactions UI. And filter for Receiving transactions *Recv* . Select NEW Recv-Mixed Item and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Repeat steps c and d to add the following parameter Select the NEW Recv-Mixed Item transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter s & enable t hem . Then click Save . Follow steps f and g for the remaining RF Receiving transactions in use Lot Configuration UI Navigate to Lot Configuration UI Select the company record and click Edit Match the settings to the below configuration Click Save Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI and click the Clear All button.  Validations The ASN must pass the following validations to enter the custom EX71 flow Lot Prompt Item/Batch combination exists on the ASN Batch = “*” Item Attributes Prompt Item/Batch combination exists on the ASN Item Attribute 2 = “*” Item Attribute 3 = “*” Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken

center 83548 center 290830 EX 7 1 – Over-Receive Lots and Item Attributes Configuration Guide 0 0 EX 7 1 – Over-Receive Lots and Item Attributes Configuration Guide Table of Contents  1. Add EX71 System Code  2. Enable Transaction Parameter  3. Post Configuration Instructions    4. Questions and Answers   Add EX 71 System Code Navigate to System Code UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for the EX 71 Code ID : Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on. If not enabled, enable it and click Save . Enable Transaction Parameter Navigate to Transactions UI. And filter for Receiving transactions *Recv* . Select NEW Recv-Mixed Item and click Program Template to add a parameter . Select the ‘Add’ button to add a new transaction parameter Add a new transaction parameter as below, hit the Save button Repeat steps c and d to add the following parameter Select the NEW Recv-Mixed Item transaction and hit the Edit button Navigate to the Parameters tab, find your newly created parameter s & enable t hem . Then click Save . Follow steps f and g for the remaining RF Receiving transactions in use Lot Configuration UI Navigate to Lot Configuration UI Select the company record and click Edit Match the settings to the below configuration Click Save Post Configuration Instructions        Once the configuration has been entered, the following actions need to be taken before the configuration is active:      System Action    Required?    No Action Needed   No   Environment Cache Clear   Yes   Environment Restart   No   App Server Restart   No      To clear the cache – go to the Cache Administration UI and click the Clear All button.  Validations The ASN must pass the following validations to enter the custom EX71 flow Lot Prompt Item/Batch combination exists on the ASN Batch = “*” Item Attributes Prompt Item/Batch combination exists on the ASN Item Attribute 2 = “*” Item Attribute 3 = “*” Questions and Answers       This below table is used to track questions that were asked and answered regarding this enhancement. If the question resulted in any action it is listed against the question.   #    Asked By    Question    Answered By    Answer    Date Added    Action Taken
